questions.question: What is the shared secret size for all ML-KEM variants?
questions.explanation: All ML-KEM variants produce a 32-byte shared secret.

questions.question: What is the public key size for ML-KEM-768?
Which security category does ML-KEM-768 target?
What mathematical problem is ML-KEM based on?
questions.explanation: ML-KEM is based on the Module-Learning With Errors problem.

questions.question: What must implementations do when decapsulation fails?
questions.explanation: ML-KEM requires implicit rejection - returning a pseudorandom value on failure.

questions.question: Which ML-KEM variant is recommended for most applications?
questions.explanation: ML-KEM-768 offers a good balance of security and performance for most use cases.

questions.question: ML-KEM operations must be constant-time to prevent side-channel attacks.
questions.explanation: Constant-time implementation is critical to prevent timing-based side-channel attacks.
